title: V973's More Items
description: A mod that adds ideas from my previous mods and mashes them with my new ideas.
body:
# V973's More Items
My first mod. Overtime, there will be new items added.
Each version will be compatible with other versions.

Mod additions:

## Terranite
A block that I scrapped from a previous mod before I decided to create mods on Modrinth. The material is hard, is designed for tools and the main block can be mined for 9 Terrachunks. (Although the tools haven't been added yet.) Can also be crafted into a door, a trapdoor,

## Coins
Currently useless. May be added to Villager trades.

## Cobblestone Bits and Deepslate Dust

_Deepslate Dust_

You can make blocks out of Deepslate Dust. Those can then be smelted into Deepslate. (Somehow.)

_Cobblestone Bits_

These can either be 2 things:

- Singular Cobblestone Bit
  - A throwable Cobblestone Bit. Can be crafted from 1 Small Pile of Cobblestone Bits. Good for combat!
- Cobblestone Bits
  - A small pile of Cobblestone Bits. Crafted from 3 Singular Cobblestone Bits.

## The Hammer and the Battleaxe

_Battleaxe_

A PVP weapon that doubles up as an axe for trees. Good for any sort of battle, unless it's a bow or crossbow fight.

_Hammer_

A PVP weapon that mines almost any block, with the only unbreakable block, Bedrock. Can be reinforced via the Smithing Table.
